Resolve local path to influence parquet files, downloading from GCS if needed

Source: R/influence.R
banc_influence_path.Rd

Resolve local path to influence parquet files, downloading from GCS if needed

Usage

banc_influence_path(local_path = NULL, force_download = FALSE, gs_url = NULL)

Arguments

local_path

Local directory for cached parquet files. Default uses tools::R_user_dir("bancr", "cache").

force_download

If TRUE, re-download even if local files exist.

gs_url

GCS path to the influence parquet directory. Defaults to the v888 all-to-all influence data in the lee-lab BANC bucket (the brain-and-nerve-cord_exports/.../banc_850/... source used in earlier bancr versions is no longer maintained, see 2026-04 bucket migration).

On this page
